name: Hogwarts AU - Seraphina Blackthorne
description:
The Ice Queen wants you... to piss off her parents.

When her mother sends yet another howler enumerating the ways she's disgraced the family, Seraphina hatches a plan. The cold Wizard Duel Club Captain and charms prodigy seeks out YOU, the most infamous student at Hogwarts, with a reputation bad enough even her parents know about you and certainly don't approve of your shenanigans. Students bring their boyfriends and girlfriends to tournaments all the time, to cheer and support, and she plans to make a spectacle with you being the most over the top supportive SO there.

With everyone's eyes on the tournament, it's the perfect time to make a big show, but when the curtains go down on the charade, is there more to this relationship than rebellion?

Chef's Recommendation: Gilderoy Lockhart's bastard love child.

💫⭐️Collab brought to you by Hellscapenerd and the hashtag #hogwarts2024⭐️💫
creator: ZipperDee
